Azure OpenAI in Microsoft Foundry Models REST API Reference

API Specifications:
- Control Plane: Latest preview: 2025-07-01-preview, Latest GA: 2025-06-01
- Data Plane Authoring: Latest preview: v1 preview, Latest GA: v1
- Data Plane Inference: Latest preview: v1 preview, Latest GA: v1
- Data Plane Inference GA version: 2024-10-21

New preview inference API available - check API lifecycle guide for details on API evolution. Preview releases follow a monthly cadence.

Authentication:
- API Key: api-key header
- Microsoft Entra ID: Bearer token in Authorization header

Core Endpoints:

1. Completions
POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/completions
Parameters: prompt, max_tokens, temperature, top_p, n, best_of, echo, frequency_penalty, presence_penalty, stop, stream, logit_bias, logprobs, seed, user

2. Embeddings
POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/embeddings
Parameters: input, user, input_type, encoding_format (float/base64), dimensions

3. Chat Completions
POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/chat/completions
Parameters: messages, temperature, top_p, stream, stop, max_tokens, max_completion_tokens, presence_penalty, frequency_penalty, logit_bias, logprobs, top_logprobs, n, parallel_tool_calls, response_format, seed, tools (max 128), tool_choice, data_sources
Message types: system, user, assistant, tool, function (deprecated)

Chat Extensions:
- Azure Search integration (simple, semantic, vector, hybrid, vector_simple_hybrid, vector_semantic_hybrid)
- Azure Cosmos DB integration (MongoDB vCore)
- Multiple authentication options: API key, connection string, system-assigned managed identity, user-assigned managed identity

4. Audio Transcriptions
POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/audio/transcriptions
Parameters: file, prompt, response_format (json, verbose_json, text, vtt, srt), temperature, language

5. Audio Translations
POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/audio/translations
Parameters: file, prompt, response_format, temperature

6. Image Generation
POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/images/generations
Parameters: prompt (max 4000 chars), n, size (1024x1024, 1792x1024, 1024x1792), response_format (url/b64_json), quality (standard/hd), style (vivid/natural), user

Content Filtering:
- Categories: sexual, violence, hate, self_harm, profanity, jailbreak
- Severity Levels: safe, low, medium, high
- Protected Material: Text and code detection with citations

Structured Outputs: JSON schema support via response_format
JSON Mode: { "type": "json_object" }
Log probabilities: logprobs and top_logprobs parameters

Key Features by Endpoint:
- Streaming: Completions, Chat (yes); Embeddings, Audio, Image (no)
- Tool/Function Calling: Chat only
- Logprobs: Completions, Chat only
- Response Format Control: Chat, Embeddings, Audio, Image
- Deterministic Output (seed): Completions, Chat only

Updated: 2026-03-29
